titleStmt.title: SII 15.716: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 716. (B.K. No. 93 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Chandranātha basti.
This is dated Śaka 1597, Rākshasa, Bhādrapada ba. 5, Sunday, corresponding to 1675 A.D., August 29, Sunday, f.d.t. °47.
It states that Banadāṁbike, wife of Kulakaraṇi Nāgabhūpa had the image of Ādinātha consecrated, as the temple was polluted by the Mohammadans entering into of forcibly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasvādvāda(dā)mōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyātraiḷōkyanā
© thasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . © . v® . śrīmanmuktimukhābjavarddhana
ravi . durmmārgakumidāravi . dōṣāṣṭadaśapaṁkasōśaṇaravi . pāpāṁ
dhakārō ravi . saddharmmāṁbeṇevakki rājipa ravi . sarvvasya nētrā ravi . śa
tataṁ bhavyara rakṣisalke kṛpeyiṁ . śrīyādināthō ravi . © .
duruḷamati turukaru baṁ daruhana Ālayava hokku keḍisalmattā . do
re nāgabhūpanarasiyu . nirutadi negaḷidaḷu paṁcakalyāṇavanaṁ . va
svasti . śrī sālivāhana saka 1597 rākṣāsanāma saṁvaccharada bhādraThe numeral originally engraved as 9 has been corrected to 7.
padamāṣa(sa) bahuḷa paṁcami Arkravāradallu . śrīmatu muḷuguṁ
dada kulakaraṇi nāgabhūpana manōvallabha banadāṁbhi(bi)
ke sīlaguṇasaṁpaṁne . śrī Ādiparamēśvaraṁge pratiṣṭeyaṁ mā
māḍisi mugiyaloḍaṁ . kaṁ sāgaravarniya . śrī saThe letter mā is redundant.
manaṁdenipa cella banadāṁbikegaṁ . śrīsukavaḍevasu nōṁpiya śrī
karadiṁdittaḍāki nōṁttaḷ sukhadiṁ . sāgaravarnniyu .The letter � is written above the line.
dhareyalu puṣpāṁjaliya nōṁpiya mudadiṁ . taruṇi hariṇa
sulōcane . gurukuce mariduṁbeguruḷa nōṁtaḷsukhadiṁ
© lakṣadīparatha Utsahava māḍisidaru .This line seems to have been added on a later date.
Digital edition of SII 15.716 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
